description: Cross-turn marker fail-closed invariant (citation-numbering family, landed with the fix per the R12 rule): a marker echoed into a LATER turn never silently resolves against that turn's fresh registry. Provenance: plan 2026-06-11-001 (history is stored marker-stripped precisely because a renormalized [1] would always be in-range next turn). Construction: 6 chunks; turn 1's pre-fetch serves the first window of 5 ([1] = bearing_guide.md), the model answers citing [1] with a proper block, and the renormalized answer is stored in history WITHOUT the marker. Turn 2's pre-fetch serves the remaining chunk (valve_specs.md, now visible as the fresh [1]); the scripted model nonetheless echoes the prior sentence including a literal '[1]' but emits NO citations block. Zero citations parse, so the egress pass leaves the text byte-identical (no renumbering, no stripping) and -- the invariant under test -- attaches NO citation: the echoed [1] must not be attributed to the stale bearing chunk nor to the fresh valve chunk. No Sources footer renders.
user_messages: What is the bearing replacement interval for P-201?
And what about the relief valve on P-201?

document_chunks.content: Replace the drive-end bearing every 8000 operating hours.
Operating envelope: 45 m3/h nominal flow at 2950 rpm.
Mechanical seal: cartridge type, plan 11 flush.
Coupling: spacer type, laser alignment required after seal work.
Relief valve set pressure: 16 bar, test annually.

turns.content:
Replace the drive-end bearing every 8000 operating hours [1].

<citations>

</citations>
Replace the drive-end bearing every 8000 operating hours [1].
